# Msingi

> School management platform built for African schools. 22 connected modules covering attendance, grades, finance, admissions, report cards, timetabling, HR, parent portals, and student portals.

## What Msingi is

Msingi is a school operating system — not a collection of tools. It is built specifically for East African schools managing CBC, CAIE, IB, British, American, or WASSCE curricula. M-Pesa Paybill integration is native. Every module connects to the same institutional record. Data entered once flows everywhere it needs to be.

## Who built it

Collins Ndolo — Physics teacher, academic coordinator, STEM educator, AI in Education trainer, and founder. Msingi was built from inside the problem, not looking at it from outside.

## Pricing

- Base: KES 150 per student per term (full admin + teacher access, all 22 modules)
- Student Portal: KES 200 per student per term (adds student-facing portal)
- Family Portal: KES 250 per student per term (adds parent-facing portal)

No setup fee. No lock-in. No module-by-module pricing.

## Where Msingi operates

Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda. Expansion to Nigeria, Ghana, and South Africa on the roadmap.

## Key capabilities

- Attendance (daily and per-period)
- Grades and examinations
- Report card generation (CBC, CAIE, IB, British, American, WASSCE, custom)
- Fee management with M-Pesa Paybill reconciliation
- Admissions pipeline (Kanban)
- Timetable builder
- HR and staff management
- Parent portal (live attendance, grades, fee statements)
- Student portal (timetable, grades, e-learning, growth profile)
- Behaviour and discipline management
- Analytics and reports
- Library, Hostel, Transport modules
- Growth profile (digital student portfolio)
- Report card signing with SHA-256 and QR verification
- RBAC — role-based access control, per-user permission overrides
- Full audit trail

## Security and compliance

- African data residency — data stays in Africa
- Tenant isolation at database layer
- Kenya Data Protection Act 2019 compliant
- Nigeria NDPR, South Africa POPIA, GDPR
- Immutable academic records
- Full permanent audit log

## Current status

Live at Mascit Lab Academy. Actively onboarding partner schools for 2026.

## Contact

hello@msingi.io
https://msingi.io/contact

- /why-choose — Why schools choose Msingi (eight narrative sections)
- /roadmap — Vision roadmap (Now / Near / Future)
- /implementation — Deployment process and data migration

- /solutions/teacher — For teachers
- /solutions/finance — For finance officers
- /solutions/parent — For parents
- /solutions/admissions — For admissions officers
